appName.description: Extension name shown in the browser UI.

appDescription.message: Always shows works hidden by Pixiv's search filter by automatically adding dgw=1 to every search and tag URL.
appDescription.description: Extension description shown in the browser's extensions page. Must be 132 characters or fewer for Chrome Web Store.

actionTitle.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the toolbar icon.

popupSubtitle.message: Pixiv re-hides filtered works on every new search. This extension adds dgw=1 to every search/tag URL so the hidden works are always shown.
popupSubtitle.description: Subtitle paragraph in the popup. Contains an inline <code> tag.

toggleLabel.message: Always show filtered Pixiv search results
toggleLabel.description: Label for the main on/off toggle in the popup.

toggleRedirectLabel.message: Redirect Pixiv logo to followers feed
toggleRedirectLabel.description: Label for the second toggle that intercepts clicks on the Pixiv home logo.

toggleRedirectHint.message: When on, clicking the Pixiv logo or home link sends you to your followers' new-works feed instead of the recommendations page.
toggleRedirectHint.description: Helper text shown under the redirect toggle.

statusLoading.description: Status line while reading the stored setting.

statusEnabled.description: Status line when the extension is on.

statusDisabled.description: Status line when the extension is off.

applyButton.description: Button that forces dgw=1 onto the active tab right now.

applyApplying.description: Inline status while the apply request is in flight.

applySuccess.message: Applied. The page is reloading with dgw=1.
applySuccess.description: Shown after a successful apply that reloads the tab.

applyNoChange.message: Already applied, or this is not a search page.
applyNoChange.description: Shown when apply was requested but no change was needed.

applyNotPixiv.message: The active tab is not a Pixiv page.
applyNotPixiv.description: Shown when the popup tries to apply on a non-Pixiv tab.

applyNoTab.description: Shown when no active tab could be queried.

applyError.message: Could not reach the page. Try reloading the Pixiv tab.
applyError.description: Shown when the content script does not respond.

footerNote.message: Only runs on www.pixiv.net. No data is collected.
footerNote.description: Footer note in the popup. Contains an inline <code> tag.
